title: save varlist/options positional corruption family
note: pq 3.0.7 fixes the audited varlist family; slab passed named projection/order and save/partition replacement checks on supported surface.

title: renamed/import-sanitized columns load all missing
note: slab loads reserved/digit/space/long/unicode names with original values preserved.

title: tm/tq/th/ty/tw period values written as daily dates
note: slab preserves period counts and display formats without daily-date reinterpretation.

title: chunk plus partition_by data loss / replace semantics
note: slab chunk row groups and partition replacement tests passed; partition replace is re-runnable and stale rows are refused without replace.

title: HH:MM display format writes all-null time column
note: slab does not classify %tcHH:MM:SS as time-of-day and preserves values.

title: uint32 values above int32 max become missing
note: slab preserves unsigned/wide integer values instead of silent missing.

title: label option blanks unlabeled numeric values
note: slab keeps numeric values on disk and round-trips labels separately.

title: failed save reports rc=0 / errors swallowed
note: slab save failures return nonzero rc, including missing dirs/codecs/partition conflicts.

title: use, clear destroys in-memory data before validation
note: slab failed loads preserve the current in-memory dataset.

title: duplicate parquet column names silently drop one column
note: slab disambiguates duplicate names and retains both columns.

title: unsupported parquet types load as all-missing rc=0
note: slab handles decimal values and loudly drops/refuses unsupported list/struct instead of all-missing success.

title: user column _pq_strl_key clobbered by strL helper
invalid in() ranges silently return empty/full data
note: slab validates invalid ranges and does not silently return empty/all rows.

title: space in parquet column name makes file unreadable
note: slab treats whitespace/hostile names as data and sanitizes safely.
